caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Affect Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing moderate winds up to 24 kt with seas reaching 6.3 ft and an ENE swell period of 8 seconds. Rain probability is at 44%, indicating scattered showers, while St. Lucia sees lighter winds near 11 kt and less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Light Winds Impact Venice Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing a 77% rain probability with light winds up to 12 kt and wave heights reaching 1.5 ft from the east. Conditions indicate a wet day with moderate seas and a swell period of 4 seconds, while Cadiz sees slightly stronger winds at 15 kt but lower rain chances.
